articles.title: Yesterday Match Result: KKR survive playoff scare as Manish Pandey, Rovman Powell seal tense chase vs MI
articles.description: The Kolkata Knight Riders pulled off a vital four-wicket victory against the Mumbai Indians, keeping their IPL playoff hopes very much alive. Chasing a modest 148, it was the sheer determination of Manish Pandey and Rovman Powell that guided them through a wobbly start and some dropped catches, ultimately sealing the crucial win.

articles.title: DR Congo will still come to United States for World Cup despite Ebola outbreak, but fans cannot
articles.description: Over 130 deaths have been confirmed after a deadly ebola outbreak in DR Congo with US putting in travel restrictions for visitors. However, players for FIFA World Cup will be exempted from travel ban.

articles.title: Indian Fans Gear Up For Football Fever After IPL, But How Will They Watch The FIFA World Cup Matches?
articles.description: Indian fans have already begun special preparations for FIFA World Cup 2026. However, a major concern remains unresolved - which broadcaster will telecast the matches in India on television?

articles.description: Both team composition and injuries played a part in keeping Mohammed Shami out of reckoning for India’s series against Afghanistan that is scheduled for June.

articles.description: Aston Villa became the sixth English team to win the Europa League, after Liverpool, Manchester United, Tottenham Hotspur, Ipswich Town and Chelsea.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs linked to Philadelphia Eagles' $12M WR after Rashee Rice setback
articles.description: The Kansas City Chiefs could reportedly revisit trade talks for A.J. Brown after fresh off-field issues involving Rashee Rice. Rice is expected to miss OTAs and minicamp following a reported probation violation tied to a positive marijuana test. NFL insider Albert Breer suggested Kansas City may need to explore reliable receiver options, with Brown emerging as a potential blockbuster target for Patrick Mahomes and the Chiefs offense.

articles.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander drops 30 as Thunder beat Spurs to level series
articles.description: Oklahoma City Thunder defeated San Antonio Spurs 122-113 to tie their Western Conference finals series at one game each. Shai Gilgeous-Alexander led the Thunder with 30 points. The Thunder's defense forced turnovers, disrupting the Spurs' rhythm. Despite a comeback attempt by San Antonio, Oklahoma City secured the win. The series now moves to San Antonio for the next two games.

articles.title: Caitlin Clark injury update: Why isn't Fever guard playing tonight vs Fire? Details of back issues
articles.description: Caitlin Clark was ruled out of Indiana Fever’s game vs Portland Fire with back issues, raising concern after her strong preseason return.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys linked to $22.5 million Minnesota Vikings star in potential defensive fix
articles.description: The Dallas Cowboys are reportedly linked to Blake Cashman as they continue searching for help at linebacker before training camp. Cashman recorded 144 tackles last season for the Minnesota Vikings and enters the final year of his $22.5 million contract. With injuries and inconsistency hurting Dallas’ defense in 2025, analysts believe the veteran linebacker could provide much-needed stability and experience in the middle of the field.

articles.title: Ronda Rousey kids: Meet daughters La’akea and Liko’ula as former UFC champion opens up about motherhood
articles.description: Ronda Rousey and Travis Browne are raising two daughters, La’akea and Liko’ula. Rousey has openly shared emotional moments from motherhood, including parenting struggles, family reunions, and welcoming her second child during the Los Angeles wildfire crisis. Despite returning briefly to MMA, she says family remains the biggest focus in her life.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2030 may adopt UEFA Champions League-style competition format
articles.description: UEFA is changing how European teams qualify for major tournaments. A new Champions League-like system will be used for the 2030 FIFA World Cup and upcoming European Championships. This aims to make matches more competitive. Top teams will play fewer opponents. Direct qualification spots are available, with playoffs deciding others. The UEFA Nations League will also be reshaped.

articles.title: Patrick Mahomes comeback rumors spiral into chaos after latest rehab update leaves Chiefs fans unsettled
articles.description: Patrick Mahomes’ ACL recovery has become one of the NFL’s biggest mysteries as fans continue speculating about his return timeline. While conspiracy theories and comeback rumors grow louder online, the NFL insists it has no secret knowledge about his recovery progress. Chiefs coach Andy Reid praised Mahomes’ intense rehab dedication, revealing the quarterback spends hours daily working toward a comeback. Despite optimism surrounding a Week 1 return, uncertainty still hangs over Kansas City’s superstar quarterback.

articles.title: "They would upstage the entire thing": Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini drama takes shocking new turn after NFL schedule claims
articles.description: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini continue dominating NFL headlines as the offseason controversy refuses to fade. Jim Rome claimed the NFL may have used the drama to boost interest in New England’s Week 1 spotlight game, while Chase Daniel and Michael Irvin urged fans to stop obsessing over personal matters. Irvin strongly defended both figures, arguing that outsiders do not know the full story behind the growing media frenzy.
